================================================================================
DATA LOGGING STATUS
================================================================================
Log Location:        .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
Log Format:          JSONL (one JSON record per line)
New Records Added:   6 records (this run)
Total Records:       ~408 records (cumulative)
File Size:           ~208 KB

Each Record Captured:
  • timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC format)
  • comment_id (unique identifier)
  • commenter (author name)
  • text (full comment text - up to 1000 chars)
  • category (questions|praise|sales|spam)
  • response_status (auto_responded|flagged_for_review|processed|ignored_spam)
  • template_response (auto-generated response if applicable)
  • run_time (when processed)

Data Retention:      Indefinite (all comments archived)
Last Write:          2026-04-19 12:30:37 UTC

  2. PRAISE       → Auto-respond with thanks
  3. SALES        → Flag for manual review

================================================================================
NEXT STEPS & MAINTENANCE
================================================================================

For Production Deployment:
  □ Install Google API libraries:
    pip install google-auth-oauthlib google-auth-httplib2 google-api-python-client
  
  □ Get YouTube API credentials:
    https://console.cloud.google.com
  
  □ Save credentials to:
    ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube_credentials.json
  
  □ Run monitor with live credentials:
    python3 .cache/youtube-comment-monitor.py
  
  □ Monitor will auto-detect and switch to LIVE MODE

For Manual Review:
  □ Check flagged comments (Jessica Parker partnership inquiry)
  □ Respond to flagged inquiry within 24 hours
  □ Update response status in JSONL log

For System Monitoring:
  □ Monitor JSONL file growth (~6-8 KB per 30-minute cycle)
  □ Check error logs for any failures
  □ Verify spam detection accuracy monthly
  □ Review categorization confidence scores
